category.title: Categories
category.delete_confirm_message: Associated assets will be moved to "Uncategorized". This action cannot be undone.
category.error_duplicate: This name is already in use.
category.error_system_readonly: The system category cannot be renamed.
category.error_system_protected: The system category cannot be deleted.
category.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
category.form_name_placeholder: e.g. US Equities, Bonds, Real Estate

asset.title: Assets
asset.empty: No assets. Create your first asset with the + button.
asset.warning_duplicate_reference: This reference matches an existing asset. You may continue if the instruments are distinct.
asset.archive_confirm_message: The asset will be removed from active lists and will no longer receive new prices. All historical data is preserved.
asset.unarchive_confirm_message: The asset will become active again and can be edited and receive new prices.

web_lookup.title: Search for an instrument
web_lookup.idle_hint: Enter a name, ticker or ISIN to search.
web_lookup.error_network: Could not reach the lookup service. Try again or fill manually.

account.title: Accounts
account.empty: No accounts. Create your first account with the + button.
account.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
account.error_duplicate: An account with this name already exists.
account.error_currency_invalid: Currency must be a 3-letter ISO 4217 code (e.g. EUR, USD).
account.delete_confirm_message: Delete account "{{name}}"? All associated holdings and transactions will be permanently deleted.
account.delete_confirm_message_non_empty: Account "{{name}}" contains {{holdingCount}} active holding(s) and {{transactionCount}} transaction(s). All data will be permanently deleted.

about.title: About
about.description: VaultCompass is a personal portfolio manager designed to track your financial assets across multiple accounts. It lets you record purchases, monitor your positions, and follow your cost basis over time. All data is stored locally on your device.
about.up_to_date: The application is up to date.

settings.title: Settings
settings.auto_record_price_label: Automatically record transaction price as market price
settings.auto_record_price_description: When enabled, new transaction forms will have the auto-record checkbox pre-checked.

app.migration_error: A database migration error occurred. Please contact support.

transaction.delete_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction? This action cannot be undone.
transaction.archived_asset_confirm_message: The selected asset is archived. Saving this transaction will automatically unarchive it. Do you want to continue?
transaction.auto_record_price_label: Use this price as the market price for {{date}}
transaction.error_validation_total: Total amount must be greater than 0.
transaction.error_invariant_mismatch: Total amount does not match the formula (quantity × price × rate) + fees.
transaction.no_transactions: No transactions recorded for this position.
transaction.select_asset_prompt: Select an asset to view transactions.

cash.no_cash_banner_message: No cash recorded for this account yet.

validation.invalid_date: Date must be a valid YYYY-MM-DD.
validation.date_in_future: Date cannot be in the future.

price_history.title: Price History
price_history.delete_confirm_message: Delete the price recorded on {{date}}? This action cannot be undone.

price_modal.title: Enter Market Price
price_modal.error_price_not_positive: Price must be greater than zero
price_modal.error_invalid_date: Date must be a valid date (YYYY-MM-DD)
price_modal.error_future_date: Date cannot be in the future

error.Unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
error.NameAlreadyExists: An account with this name already exists.
error.InvalidRiskLevel: Risk level must be between 1 and 5.
error.Archived: This asset is archived and cannot be edited.
error.NotFound: The requested item was not found.
error.ActiveHoldings: Cannot archive an asset that still has active holdings.
error.ExistingTransactions: Cannot delete an asset that has existing transactions.
error.CategoryNotFound: The selected category was not found.
error.DuplicateName: A category with this name already exists.
error.SystemReadonly: The system category cannot be renamed.
error.SystemProtected: The system category cannot be deleted.
error.NonFinite: Price must be a finite number.
error.DateInFuture: Date cannot be in the future.
error.TypeImmutable: Cannot change the type of an existing transaction.
error.ClosedPosition: No units available to sell for this asset.
error.Oversell: Sell quantity exceeds the units available in the holding.
error.CascadingOversell: Editing this transaction would leave a later transaction without enough units.
error.ExchangeRateNotPositive: Exchange rate must be strictly positive.
error.TotalAmountNotPositive: Total amount must be strictly positive.
error.ArchivedAsset: Cannot open a balance for an archived asset.
error.InvalidTotalCost: Total cost must be strictly positive.
error.OpeningBalanceOnCashAsset: Cannot open a balance on the system Cash Asset.
